creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
Pure is a modern-style functional programming language based on term rewriting. The interpreter uses LLVM as a backend to JIT-compile Pure programs to fast native code. Check it's official website for details:
	https://code.google.com/p/pure-lang/

Fix: In this port, I combined the interpreter and the Pure documentations (without docs, the `help' command inside the interpreter will not work). The docs and the examples will be installed if the corresponding NOPORT* is not specified.
